title: Reasoning math
description: A single reasoning-heavy question with visible thinking and a compact final answer.

events.text: A factory has three machines with different failure probabilities. Which maintenance schedule minimizes expected downtime?
Compare the expected loss of preventive replacement against failure repair time, normalize by production value and search the weekly schedule space.
The lowest expected downtime comes from servicing Machine B every second Friday, Machine A monthly and Machine C only after the vibration threshold crosses the warning band.
